_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of internal tactics to anticipate and/or emulate threat capabilities and actions.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting AI security assessments, including threat modeling for AI systems, attack surface analysis, and control gap identification.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI RM domain. RM-S-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-T-002 (RM, cosine: 0.537), RM-K-005 (RM, cosine: 0.528).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.523). Shared vocabulary: [threat]. DCWF-only terms [actions, anticipate, capabilities, emulate, internal, knowledge] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, analysis, assessments, attack, conducting, control] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.876 (P=0.879, R=0.872). Balanced P/R — the 12-word DCWF element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Knowledge of internal tactics to anticipate and/or emulate threat capabilities a" and "Skill in conducting AI security assessments, including threat modeling for AI sy" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.546 ≈ STS 0.523 (gap 0.023). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [threat] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.1%. Shared tokens: [threat]. DCWF-only: [actions, anticipate, capabilities, emulate, internal, knowledge]. WIDAI-only: [ai, analysis, assessments, attack, conducting, control].
